zhTitle: AI 入口正在从 App 重新分配到设备与系统层
enTitle: AI entry points are moving from apps into systems and devices
zhSummary: Apple、Google、Microsoft 把 agent 推进 OS、AI PC、智能眼镜与 agent-first device。野生信号与研究信号显示，用户真正关心的是电池、隐私、反馈和控制权。
enSummary: Apple, Google, and Microsoft are pushing agents into operating systems, AI PCs, smart glasses, and agent-first devices. Wild and research signals show that battery, privacy, feedback, and control are becoming the real UX battleground.

coverStory.zhTitle: Googlebook 把 AI PC 从功能清单推成一个新入口类别
coverStory.enTitle: Googlebook pushes the AI PC from feature bundle into new entry-point category
zhSummary: 最强信号不是又多了一个模型能力，而是电脑形态被重新定义为 Gemini Intelligence 的容器。
这类入口会把用户的输入、上下文和反馈从 App 内部迁移到系统层。
如果成立，AI PC 的竞争重点会从芯片跑分转向日常任务闭环、权限透明和可恢复控制。
enSummary: The strongest signal is not another model feature, but a laptop category reframed as a Gemini Intelligence container.
That moves input, context, and feedback from individual apps into the system layer.
If it holds, AI PC competition shifts from chip benchmarks toward everyday task closure, permission clarity, and recoverable control.
coverStory.whyCover: It changes the product interface boundary: the laptop becomes an AI system surface, not just a host for AI apps.
